tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.welcome: Welcome to the Text Editor mode. Here you can write native code for your project.
tutorial.step3: Click Run Code above to see the output.

steps.title: Start Your Journey
steps.content: Welcome to your first project! Today we will learn how to make an actor move.

steps.title: Event Setup
steps.content: Use the 'when green flag clicked' block to start your program.

steps.title: Move the Actor
steps.content: Add a 'move 10 steps' block below the event block you just created.
